scripts.check: npm run build && cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all -- --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.tauri:dev: node scripts/ensure-dist.mjs && node scripts/sync-ollama-installer.mjs && tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: npm run build && node scripts/sync-ollama-installer.mjs && tauri build
